tools.name: list_supported_chains
tools.title: List supported chains
tools.description: List the testnet chains Bridgr can bridge between, including chain id, CCIP selector, and the deployed bridge contract address on each chain.

tools.name: list_bridge_tokens
tools.title: List bridgeable tokens
tools.description: List the tokens Bridgr can move across chains (native ETH plus supported ERC20s), with per-chain token addresses where applicable.

tools.name: get_destination_pool_balance
tools.title: Get destination pool balance
tools.description: Read the current liquidity available in the Bridgr destination pool for a given chain and token. Use this to check if a bridge of a given size can be fulfilled on the destination chain.

chainId.description: Destination chain id (e.g. 11155111 for Sepolia, 84532 for Base Sepolia).
